scripts.build: pnpm --filter @marlinjai/data-table-core run build && pnpm --filter @marlinjai/data-table-adapter-d1 run build && pnpm --filter @marlinjai/data-table-adapter-memory run build && pnpm --filter @marlinjai/data-table-react run build && pnpm --filter @marlinjai/data-table-file-adapter-storage-brain run build && pnpm --filter @marlinjai/data-table-adapter-data-brain run build
